name: Tyler Texas Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground round, onions, and bell pepper until fully cooked.
2. Add garlic to the pan and continue cooking until fragrant.
3. Incorporate cumin, Cayenne pepper, red pepper flakes, chili powder, and bay leaves into the mixture.
4. Stir in the tomatoes, tomato paste, and remaining ingredients except for the beans and jalapeno peppers.
5. Simmer the chili for 2 hours to allow flavors to meld.
6. Add the beans and sliced jalapenos to the pot.
7. Continue simmering for an additional hour until the chili reaches your desired consistency and flavor.
